def eligible_for_hearing_rehabilitation(self) -> bool:
        eligible_criteria = self.get_eligible_criteria()
        if (self.age > 0 and
            self.gender.lower() in eligible_criteria.get('gender', []) and
            self.race.lower() in eligible_criteria.get('race', []) and
            self.employment_status.lower() in eligible_criteria.get('employment_status', []) and
            self.education.lower() in eligible_criteria.get('education', []) and
            self.marital_status.lower() in eligible_criteria.get('marital_status', []) and
            self.religion.lower() in eligible_criteria.get('religion', []) and
            self.hearing_loss.lower() in eligible_criteria.get('hearing_loss', [])):
            return True
        else:
            return False
